series_metadata.series_title: Social Security / Holder - Cross Reference File
series_metadata.series_description: Cross reference file of all persons holding a permit to sell liquor in the state of Ohio. Includes individuals name, social security number and permit number.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain hard copy in the operating area until entered into the database and then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine-readable records on the computer database until superseded or until record series is no longer created, and then destroy by erasure., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
